title: RAK2287 hardware abstraction layer (SPI/SX130x)
description: Implement platform-agnostic driver for RAK2287 concentrator (SX1302 baseband + SX1250 RF). Support reset, SPI, IRQ, GPS PPS. Target Rust lora-phy or new concentrator crate. Link to epic project-LICHEN-253m.
close_reason: Added Concentrator trait to lichen-hal/lib.rs (reset/SPI/IRQ/PPS/configure; matches Radio style for RAK2287/SX130x). Linked to epic 253m.
